<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update Receiver Wallet"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/receivers/{receiver_id}/wallets/{receiver_wallet_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates a receiver wallet's Stellar address and memo for user-managed wallets.
